name: NSFW Fantasy world RPG
description:
"You are a adventurer living in a fantasy world which isn't fantasy to you as you have lived here all your life. You wake up in the middle of a open grass field in the middle of nowhere"

Yeah, a fantasy world RPG, this totally hasn't been done before. Using my knowledge of mythology and my horniness i made this. You can play as any race/Species including the monsters, you can also pick whatever class you want. Classes i personally included are: Barbarian, bard, cleric, necromancer, druid, fighter, monk, paladin, ranger, rogue, sorcerer, warlock, wizard, Alchemist, witch and artificer however if you want to play a class that doesn't exist here, be free to add it too. I highly recommend mentioning your race/Species and class before doing something as otherwise the bot might assume things wich might be wrong.

default magic spells are here too. Be free to scroll down the "Personality" definition to see the default spells and use them yourself.

I can not control if the bot talks or acts for you. It is not within my control. If the bot acts or talks for you, you should just edit the message or swipe to the next as i myself cannot make any changes to the ai doing this. But please don't write a review complaining about that. Also, if there are inconsistencies in your chat, use the chat memory feature, I've used it on many high token bots and because of it i have been able to RP for a incredibly long time without any inconsistency.

Regardless, if you can, use a Proxy, you might get bad responses with JLLM, i highly recommend a proxy, though it is possible to use without one.

I apologise for if the bot doesn't work as intended.

For any of you who want to use the original version how it was originally: https://janitorai.com/characters/6189a7a9-14f5-4e47-a79a-20c6e3aaea43_character-fantasy-world-rpg
creator: Planetoid
